title: coaching — TenancyHook + lifecycle hooks
description: Cross-module hook implementations. Coaching does not register a bootstrapper. Ships five hooks: prevent staff-offboarding with active profile, tenant erasure cascade, staff-offboarded cascade, profile-deactivated → cancel-assignments cascade, cert-added → schedule expiration notices.

hooks.name: PreventStaffOffboardingWithActiveCoachingProfile
hooks.purpose: Refuse the Staff offboard when the Staff still has an active CoachingProfile UNLESS the offboard invocation carries cascade=true. When cascade=true, the DeactivateCoachingProfileOnStaffOffboarded hook takes over post-write. This preserves the invariant that a Staff cannot be silently offboarded while carrying open coaching commitments.
hooks.returns: STAFF_OFFBOARD_HAS_ACTIVE_COACHING_PROFILE (409) with the profile_id in the error payload
hooks.note: Priority 48 — runs AFTER other staff-cascade guards (branch-manager guard at 45, coach-parent guard at 46). This is the last coaching-owned refusal in the chain.

hooks.name: DeactivateCoachingProfileOnStaffOffboarded
hooks.purpose: Post-offboard cascade. Flips CoachingProfile.is_active=false with trigger='staff_offboarded'. Fires CoachingProfileDeactivated. Downstream CancelActiveAssignmentsOnCoachingProfileDeactivated cancels open assignments.
hooks.note: Priority 20 — runs BEFORE notification listeners so the notification carries the resolved deactivation reason.

hooks.name: CancelActiveAssignmentsOnCoachingProfileDeactivated
hooks.purpose: Cancels every active CoachAssignment for the deactivated profile. Fires one CoachAssignmentCancelled per assignment with trigger='coaching_profile_deactivated'.

hooks.name: ScheduleExpirationNoticesOnCertificationAdded
hooks.purpose: When the cert has expires_at, schedules NotifyCertificationExpiringJob at (expires_at - 90d), (- 30d), (- 7d). Also schedules NotifyCertificationExpiredJob at expires_at. Idempotent — reruns replace the schedule (used when admin updates the cert's expires_at).

hooks.name: PurgeCoachingDataForErasedTenant
hooks.purpose: Cascade delete via FK. Writes compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics per entity (profiles / assignments / certifications / ratings). Skips rows under an active regulator hold (defense-in-depth: reads the tenancy audit trail's active-hold flags before firing).
hooks.compliance: GDPR Art. 17 — right to erasure. Coaching rows cascade with the tenant. `coaching_extended_retention` grandfathers the extended window per-record.

no_bootstrapper.reason: Coaching does not need a tenant-boot hydration path — every row loads on demand. The CoachingProfileRepository + AvailabilityResolver + AssignmentConflictDetector bindings cache lazily on first query.
